prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body cosplay portrait of a cute young woman dressed as Pikachu-inspired electric mouse girl, seated centered on an ornate vintage pink tufted loveseat. She has long wavy ash-blonde hair with soft bangs and twin side sections, large expressive eyes, natural glossy makeup, and a gentle smile while looking directly at the camera. Her pose is demure and playful: knees together facing forward, feet on the floor, both hands lifted near her head as if adjusting the ears. Costume details: a yellow headband with two tall lightning-mouse ears with black tips, a fitted strapless yellow mini dress with black V-shaped bust detail and a flared skirt, long yellow arm warmers, yellow thigh-high stockings, black armband accents, a black choker with a small metal ring, and black high-heeled Mary Jane platform shoes. Setting: an elegant pastel room with powder-blue walls, gold-trimmed wall molding, a carved dark-wood rococo sofa frame, dusty-rose velvet upholstery, pale wood floor, and softly blurred background decor including a white ornate mantel, pink flowers in a vase, and warm chandelier-like lights. Lighting should be soft natural window light with warm highlights, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, luxury fashion cosplay photography style, vertical 9:16 composition, sharp focus on the subject, realistic fabric texture, flattering skin tones, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
